Vendor: # Post 4: Reusing Your Existing VMware Hosts

column8: Notes
Most common in modern servers. Download Intel WS2025 driver package for RDMA/SR-IOV.
Excellent Hyper-V support. Vendor driver required for RDMA.
Good basic connectivity. No RDMA support.
Works well for management NICs. Too slow for live migration/storage.
Download WinOF-2 from NVIDIA for full RDMA functionality.
Widely deployed. Download WinOF-2. Excellent Hyper-V/SMB Direct support.
Older generation but still supported.
Good Windows support. Vendor driver for RDMA.
Common in HPE ProLiant. Vendor driver from HPE or Broadcom.
Good Windows support. Download from Marvell support portal.
iWARP is driver-based — no DCB switch config needed. Good for environments without PFC-capable switches.
Cisco VICs have native Windows drivers but require firmware/driver download from Cisco. Verify your exact VIC model.
Notes
Download Emulex OneCommand Manager. Set appropriate login timeout values.
Latest generation. Full Windows Server 2025 support.
Extremely common in enterprise. Excellent Windows support.
Download QConvergeConsole for management and optimal timeout values.
Latest generation QLogic. Full Windows Server 2025 support.
Very common. Solid Windows support history.
Notes
Standard inbox driver works. Dell OpenManage for advanced management/diagnostics.
Entry-level PERC. Fully supported with inbox driver.
Used for OS boot drives. Fully supported. Not for VM storage.
Inbox driver works. HPE Smart Storage Administrator for advanced management.
Very common in HPE ProLiant. Excellent Windows support.
HPE proprietary NVMe boot device. Fully supported.
Broadcom MegaRAID-based. Inbox driver works. Vendor driver for StorCLI.
Latest generation. Full Windows Server 2025 support.
Inbox driver sufficient for operation. Download StorCLI for management.
Used for HBA-mode (no RAID). Works with Windows MPIO for iSCSI/MPIO scenarios.
Notes
GPU-P (partitioning) supported. DDA also supported. Download from NVIDIA NGC.
GPU-P supported on RTX A-series. Check GPU-P compatibility for specific model.
Common in older deployments. DDA supported. GPU-P supported on WS2025.
Limited GPU-P support. Verify specific model on AMD WS2025 support matrix.
DDA supported. GPU-P verify per model.
Notes
iDRAC works independently of OS. Keep firmware current. OpenManage agent for OS-level inventory.
iLO works independently. HPE Agentless Management Service (AMS) for OS integration.
XCC works independently. XClarity Provisioning Manager for OS deployment.
CIMC works independently of OS. Download Cisco UCS tools for Windows integration.
